task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map to Sükhbaatar Square in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is centered on Ulaanbaatar. Labels such as 'Ulaanbaatar', 'Sükhbaatar Square', or 'Government Palace' are visible.

task_completion.description: Agent activates the ruler or distance measurement tool within the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Ruler', 'Measure Distance', or similar tool dialog is open, or the cursor indicates a measurement mode.

task_completion.description: Agent draws a measurement line from Ulaanbaatar to the nearest ocean coastline (Bohai Sea).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A straight line extends Southeast from Ulaanbaatar towards the coast near Beijing/Tianjin (the Bohai Sea).

task_completion.description: The measured distance is visible and falls within the verified range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement tool displays a distance reading between 1,150 km and 1,200 km (or approximately 715-745 miles).

task_completion.description: Agent saves the measurement path with the name 'Ulaanbaatar_to_Coast' in the application's places list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar, 'My Places' panel, or saved items list contains an entry explicitly named 'Ulaanbaatar_to_Coast'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves a screenshot of the measurement to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window or terminal output confirms the file '/home/ga/Documents/distance_measurement.png' has been created.

integrity.description: Agent uses a GUI-based mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) rather than a script or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping software with map rendering, not just code or text output.

integrity.description: The measurement is performed interactively, not hardcoded or pasted.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of the task (e.g., ruler tool active, line being drawn) rather than a sudden appearance of the final result.

integrity.description: The final image is captured from the screen, not downloaded or moved from a pre-existing source.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a screenshot tool (e.g., 'scrot', system print screen) being triggered or the application's 'Save Image' dialog being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Start location: Sükhbaatar Square, Ulaanbaatar (47.9188°N, 106.9175°E). Nearest coastline: Bohai Sea (Southeast direction). Expected distance: 1,150 km to 1,200 km.
